recipe: Mistral-7B-v0.1 + TheBloke/Mistral-7B-v0.1-AWQ, input_len=1024, output_len=256, num_prompts=32, enforce_eager, gpu_memory_utilization=0.15 (VLLM_BENCH_GPU_MEM), max_model_len=8192 (dropped by vLLM on this build — engine used default max_seq_len)
summary: FP16 vs TurboQuant paths stay within ~7% (~1760 vs ~1880 output tok/s). AWQ + FP16 KV and AWQ + TQ are ~35% slower (~1210–1244 tok/s): weight dequant dominates vs dense FP16 GEMMs at this shape.
script_notes: scripts/run_story2_quant_kv_heavy.sh runs one Python process per backend so AWQ awq_dequantize is not broken by a prior FP16 engine in the same interpreter.
